general.author: Rita Patel
general.body: Hey team — checking in on Q3 pipeline. Vibeface has my daily brief ready.

text.text:
Your morning state: *$410K on track* / *$90K needs you* / *$0 blocked*

2 deals need your attention: Runners Club (budget objection) and Sporty Nation (champion silent). Open the Slackbot panel on the right →

general.author: Rita Patel
general.body: What about the Acme situation? Marcus left.

text.text: Marcus Lee left Acme in the last 48 hours. Vibeface identified *Priya Shah* (via Sarah Chen) and *Daniel Kim* (VP Procurement, attended your Q1 webinar) as potential new champions. Intro draft ready for review.

sales.author: Sarah Chen
sales.body: q1 day 1. let's hit the ground running. pipeline review at 2pm

sales.author: Rita Patel
sales.body: runners club back on track. roi deck worked

sales.author: Sarah Chen
sales.body: nice work rita. that's a big win

sales.author: Jordan Hayes
sales.body: anyone need poc support this week? i'm booked but can shuffle

q3-pipeline.author: Rita Patel
q3-pipeline.body: q4 wrap-up: $471k attained. $29k short of accelerator

q3-pipeline.author: Sarah Chen
q3-pipeline.body: solid quarter. q1 commit is $500k. let's exceed it

q3-pipeline.author: Rita Patel
q3-pipeline.body: runners club ($720k) and greentech ($430k) should get us there

q3-pipeline.author: Sarah Chen
q3-pipeline.body: sporty nation ($270k) is high risk. champion silent for 14 days

slackbot.author: Slackbot
slackbot.body: Hi Rita! I'm here to help with your sales pipeline. Ask me anything about your deals, meetings, or follow-ups.

deal-acme.author: Rita Patel
deal-acme.body: Marcus was our champion — he left. Need to identify new stakeholders ASAP.

text.text:
*Acme Corp* — Champion departed

Marcus Lee no longer at Acme. Vibeface identified:
• *Priya Shah* — Sarah Chen intro, same team
• *Daniel Kim* — VP Procurement, attended Q1 webinar

Intro draft ready. Commission at risk: ~$14K.

deal-acme.author: Rita Patel
deal-acme.body: Sent intro to Priya via Sarah. Daniel Kim — can we pull the webinar attendee list?

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: initial discovery call went well. champion is mike torres, vp ops. they're evaluating 3 vendors. timeline is q1 close.

deal-runners.author: Jordan Hayes
deal-runners.body: poc scheduled for next week. they want to test integration with their existing erp system

deal-runners.author: Sarah Chen
deal-runners.body: how's the poc going? any blockers?

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: poc completed successfully. mike's team loved the automation features. moving to contract discussions

deal-runners.author: Priya Shah
deal-runners.body: contract draft sent. standard msa terms. waiting on their legal review

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: update: cfo stepped in. wants to see roi justification before signing. budget freeze across the board

deal-runners.author: Jordan Hayes
deal-runners.body: roi deck in progress. pulling their actual usage data from the poc. should show strong numbers

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: mike's been great. he's advocating internally but cfo is holding firm. need that deck asap

deal-runners.author: Jordan Hayes
deal-runners.body: roi deck sent. shows 3.2x roi over 3 years based on their usage. includes cost savings from automation and efficiency gains

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: cfo reviewing now. mike says he's impressed with the numbers. fingers crossed 🤞

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: cfo approved! budget objection resolved. deal back on track 🚀

deal-runners.author: Sarah Chen
deal-runners.body: excellent work team. $720k commit secured. this is exactly the kind of persistence we need for q1

deal-runners.author: Priya Shah
deal-runners.body: contract is ready to sign. legal cleared all terms. waiting on their final signature

deal-runners.author: Rita Patel
deal-runners.body: mike confirmed they'll sign by eod friday. q1 commit locked in 🎯

deal-greentech.author: Rita Patel
deal-greentech.body: Priya said 'just send me the SOW and I'll get it signed this week.' SOW sent.

text.text:
*Greentech* — $60K, Proposal stage

Champion Priya Shah actively closing. SOW sent. No risk signals. On track for commit.

deal-greentech.author: Rita Patel
deal-greentech.body: Following up with Priya on SOW. She's been responsive.

deal-sporty.author: Rita Patel
deal-sporty.body: Dana went silent. Proposal viewed 14x, no reply. Company doing layoffs — procurement likely frozen.

text.text:
*Sporty Nation* — Champion silent 14 days

Vibeface identified 2 alternate stakeholders: Mike Torres (Ops) and Jen Walsh (Marketing). Both engaged on LinkedIn. Outreach draft ready.

deal-sporty.author: Rita Patel
deal-sporty.body: Reaching out to Mike Torres. Dana's team might be in flux.

deal-techstart.author: Rita Patel
deal-techstart.body: QBR at 2 PM tomorrow. Sarah Chen is our champion. $95K expansion on the table.

text.text:
*TechStart QBR* — 2:00 PM today

Sarah Chen (champion) active. Talking points: QBR recap, expansion options, timeline to close. Brief ready in Seller Edge.

deal-techstart.author: Rita Patel
deal-techstart.body: Reviewed the brief. Ready for the call.

sarah-chen.author: Sarah Chen
sarah-chen.body: rita — runners club deal reopened. cfo wants roi deck before they'll commit. can you get jordan on this? 👀

sarah-chen.author: Rita Patel
sarah-chen.body: on it. jordan's building it now. should have it by eod

sarah-chen.author: Sarah Chen
sarah-chen.body: good. this is panic mode. $720k commit at risk 😬

sarah-chen.author: Rita Patel
sarah-chen.body: jordan sent the deck. shared with cfo. waiting on feedback

sarah-chen.author: Sarah Chen
sarah-chen.body: keep me posted. pipeline hygiene is critical for q1

priya-shah.author: Priya Shah
priya-shah.body: greentech sow is back. legal flagged 3 redlines in section 4

priya-shah.author: Rita Patel
priya-shah.body: what are the redlines? can we negotiate?

priya-shah.author: Priya Shah
priya-shah.body: liability caps and data residency. standard stuff. i'll send you the marked-up version

priya-shah.author: Rita Patel
priya-shah.body: thanks priya. $430k deal — need this closed

priya-shah.author: Priya Shah
priya-shah.body: msa is ready. just need their legal to sign off. should be done by friday

jordan-hayes.author: Jordan Hayes
jordan-hayes.body: runners club roi deck is done. sent to you and sarah

jordan-hayes.author: Rita Patel
jordan-hayes.body: perfect timing. cfo is reviewing it now

jordan-hayes.author: Jordan Hayes
jordan-hayes.body: built it with their actual usage data. shows 3.2x roi over 3 years

jordan-hayes.author: Rita Patel
jordan-hayes.body: cfo loved it. budget objection resolved 🚀

jordan-hayes.author: Jordan Hayes
jordan-hayes.body: nice. that was a close one. $720k back on track

dana-torres.author: Dana Torres
dana-torres.body: sporty nation deal is moving forward. i'll get you the exec sponsor intro

dana-torres.author: Rita Patel
dana-torres.body: hey dana — checking in on sporty nation. haven't heard back

dana-torres.author: Rita Patel
dana-torres.body: dana — still waiting on exec sponsor intro. $270k deal is at risk

dana-torres.author: Rita Patel
dana-torres.body: 14 days silent. champion gone dark. should i escalate?

marcus-lee.author: Marcus Lee
marcus-lee.body: Rita — the Acme deal is looking good. I'm pushing for Q3 close. Will loop in legal next week.

marcus-lee.author: Rita Patel
marcus-lee.body: Thanks Marcus! Appreciate your support. Let me know when legal is in the loop.

lisa-park.author: Lisa Park
lisa-park.body: Jordan (our CFO) wants to understand ROI before signing. I've connected you two — he's open to a 30-min call.

lisa-park.author: Rita Patel
lisa-park.body: Perfect, thank you Lisa! I'll send a value deck and set up the call.

lisa-park.author: Lisa Park
lisa-park.body: Sounds good. He's detail-oriented but fair. The deck will help.

daniel-kim.author: Rita Patel
daniel-kim.body: Hi Daniel — Sarah Chen mentioned you attended our Q1 webinar. I'd love to connect about Acme's procurement needs.

daniel-kim.author: Daniel Kim
daniel-kim.body: Thanks for reaching out. Yes, I was at the webinar. We're evaluating solutions for Q1. Can we pull the contract forward?

daniel-kim.author: Rita Patel
daniel-kim.body: Absolutely. Let me send over the proposal and we can discuss timeline. Q1 pipeline needs this.

mike-torres.author: Rita Patel
mike-torres.body: Hi Mike — following up on the Sporty Nation proposal. Dana mentioned you might be a good contact.

mike-torres.author: Mike Torres
mike-torres.body: Thanks Rita. Things are a bit in flux here after the Q4 reorg. Dana's team structure changed.

mike-torres.author: Rita Patel
mike-torres.body: I understand. Let me know when things settle — happy to reconnect. The proposal is still valid.
